sourcesContent:
const dbProjects = [
  {
    num: "01",
    title: "Pranna.es",
    tech: "HTML5 - CSS3 / SCSS - Bootstrap",
    description:
      "Website designed and developed for Pranna, a vegan food company based in Barcelona. The project was created as part of a web development course at Coderhouse. The website was built using HTML and CSS, incorporating the Bootstrap framework.",
    scope: "Web design, development",
    img: "/assets/img/pranna-preview.png",
    url: "https://valentinaandrada.github.io/pranna.es/",
    github: "https://valentinaandrada.github.io/pranna.es/"
  },
  {
    num: "02",
    title: "Budget App",
    tech: "HTML5 - CSS3 - JavaScript - API",
    description:
      "Lorem ipsum dolor sit, amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Non tenetur sunt, delectus ut inventore modi corrupti soluta officia deserunt vel quis nostrum illo eaque eum quidem error quos doloremque saepe consectetur est dolores esse optio! Nihil optio iusto quo harum",
    scope: "Web design, development",
    img: "/assets/img/budgetapp-preview.png",
    url: "https://valentinaandrada.github.io/pranna.es/",
    github: "https://valentinaandrada.github.io/pranna.es/"
  },
  {
    num: "03",
    title: "Lambda Store - Ecommerce",
    tech: "HTML | CSS | Bootstrap | React JS |",
    description:
      "Lambda Store, a Single-page Application (SPA), offers users a swift browsing and shopping experience through dynamic content loading, state management, and UI updates, avoiding the need for full-page reloads. Designed and developed as part of the Web Development course at Coderhouse.",
    scope: "Web design, development",
    img: "/assets/img/lambdastore-preview.png",
    url: "https://valentinaandrada.github.io/pranna.es/",
    github: "https://valentinaandrada.github.io/pranna.es/"
  },
];

export default dbProjects;
